geopolitics.title: Is The US Considering Seizing Iran's Kharg Island?
geopolitics.description: Iran's Kharg Island, the country's main oil export outlet, could be a target for the United States, experts say, in a move that could cut off the revenues that sustain Tehran's sanctions-hit economy.
